title: Corkboard
description: A simple cork board mod for all your note-taking needs!
body:
![Corkboard Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5eddd667647ffea0c91fe36b1597fb7ed077959d.png) Have you ever wanted to take notes _inside_ of minecraft?
well, now you can!!
Introducing the amazing Corkboard mod! ![Usage of corkboard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/z8qfgGTf/images/3d404bea4cd9c9261b509ca68157ab7acfde521f.png) # Features - Adds the Corkboard block. the centerpeice of this mod. - Adds the Note. A writable peice of paper that can be displayed on the Corkboard!

Recipes Corkboard: ![Corkboard Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2c3eecc6de51c26d14137436be956b110e48c4f.png) Note: ![Note Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9909f203ad9ea27fbd79892b009f4455b869cfe8.png)
## Support if you'd like to support further development and the development of future mods, donate via ko-fi! <3 ## License I use the GPL 3.0 license, feel free to modify and use the code I have written! though please do credit me in anything you use from it! Feel free to use this in a modpack, but again, credit me! <3<3
